titleStmt.title: SII 28.35: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 35. (A.R. No. 35 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple-Central Shrine, east base of the maṇḍapa in front of

Records the transaction conducted by the paṉ-nāṭṭavar including nāḍu and nagaram of several maṇḍalams having met at Periyanāṭṭāṉ-kāvu in Ugaḷūr on the said date, to hear complaints (paḻi-kāriyam). It states that in the 4th year of Vikramachōḷa-dēvar, their ancestors (mūdādikaḷ) (apparently those who are specified later as the paḷḷi-nāṭṭavar) who after securing the consent of specified paḷḷis holding kāṇi in four places in that nāḍu, had decided to levy 50 kāśu and one kuṟuṉi of rice per family (kuḍi) (belonging to the group) to make up 5000 kāśu and 100 kalam of rice, even by exercising coersion (as and when necessary) for providing for the food offerings, side-dishes and decorations every day including the day of the festivals to the God in the temple of Kuraṅgāḍi-Mahādēvar in Iṟaiyānpuñchai in Ugaḷūr-kūṟṟam in Muḍikoṇḍachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. A new image of that deity was installed as the original image had been taken away to Torasamuttiram (Dvārasamudram) (Torasamuttirattara-eḷuntaruḷi-ppōgaiyil) when periya-vaḍugaṉ disturbed the tranquility (chēmam-iḷaka) and caused a turmoil (Periya vaḍukan kalakam). It is stated that in view of this benefaction made, Perumāḷ-Kulōttuṅga-chōḷa had orally ordered that the paḷḷi-nāṭṭavar should be honoured with silken (paṭṭu) head-gear (parivaṭṭam), first service with sacred water (titimunōḍukkum) and the announcement of their distinguised identify as paṉṉaṭṭāṉ-tambirān and vandān dēvargaḷ-dēvan in that order when they started out. Probably the benefaction was not being properly carried out necessitating the assemblage of the pan-nāṭṭavar on the date of this record. Now this body resolved that the levies would be collected as decided earlier. Further they also decided that for the food offerings and decoration (chāttupaṭi) of this nayanār, one paṇam per bow (vil) would be collected in the several maṇḍalams in addition.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉa ccakravattikaḷ śrīparākrama pāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu 4 vatu varuṣam vaikāci mātam nālān tiyati pala maṇṭalaṅkaḷil nāṭum nakaramum Ellā maṇṭalaṅkaḷil
paṉnāṭṭavarum paḻikāriyaṅkeḻppatāka Ukaḷūril periyanāṭṭāṉ kāvil niṟaivaṟa niṟaintu kuṟaivaṟak kūṭi Irukka Uṭaiyār kuṟṟam poruttaruḷiya nāyaṉār�
koyilil Eṅkaḷ mutātikaḷ veṭṭinapaṭi tribhuvaṉa ccakravattikaḷ śrīvikramacoḻa tevarkku yāṇṭu 4 varuṣam n=tu muṭikoṇṭacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Ukaḷūr kūṟṟattu Iṟaiyāyāṉ puñ
cai kuraṅkāṭi mahātevarkku Ināṭṭil Āyakkuṭiyil kāṇi Uṭaiya paḷḷikaḷil poṉṉanāḷ muṭikoṇṭa coḻa muttaraiyaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum Ovalappāṭiyilk kāṇi Uṭai
ya paḷḷikaḷil kāḷi tiriccaṉ vikkirama coḻamuttaraiyaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum toṅkapūrattil kāṇi Uṭaiya paḷḷikaḷil Aḻakan Ampalavaṇ kulottuṅka coḻamuttaraiyaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum
makatai maṇṭalattuRead makatai maṇṭalattutoḻuvūr paṟṟil kuṟukkaiyil kāṇi Uṭaiya paḷḷikaḷil pāṇṭiyaṉ cokkaṉ mākata coḻa muttaraiyaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum Ivvaṉaivarom kalveṭṭikuṭutta pa
ricāvatu Iṉṉāyanār koyilil tirumeṉi nāyamār periya vaṭukaṉ kalakattil cemam Iḷakat toracamuttirateṟa Eḻuṉtaruḷi pokaiyil Iṉṉāyamārukku neṭu Attam kuṭuttu miṇṭum koyilile Eḻuṉta
ruḷappaṇṇi nātaḷḷeṉṟu koṇṭa Upayamāvatu Iṉṉāyanār tirunāḷuḷḷiṭṭa pala tivasaṅkaḷukkum Amutu paṭikku Arici nūṟṟukkalamum paṭiveñcaṉamañRead veñcaṉamuñ cāttupaṭikku kācu Aiyyāyiramum In
ta kuṟukkaiyil kāṇi Uṭaiya paḷḷikaḷil mākata coḻamuttaraiyaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār tirunāḷkkaḷ toṟum kuṟaivaṟuttu viranārāyaṇaṉ pererikku meṟku paccai malaikku kiḻakku
kūraveri Āṟṟukku vaṭakku peṇṇai Āṟṟukkut teṟkku Uḷḷiṭṭa paḷḷikaḷ tirunāḷtoṟum kuṭikku Aimpatu kācum Arici kuṟuṇiyumāka nāṭṭile veṇkalam Eṭuttu maṇkalam Iṭittu
m kuttiyum taṇṭiya mutalākki tirunāḷtoṟum Ippaṭi kuṟaivaṟukkakkaṭavomākavum cammatittuc caṉtirātittavaraiyum cellak kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom paḷḷināṭṭavarom Ippaṭi cey
ta paḷḷināṭṭavarkku paṭṭum parivaṭṭamum titamuṉoṭukkum peṟakkaṭavatākavum Eḻuntaruḷippuṟappaṭṭāl vantāṉ tevarkaḷ tevaṉ Eṉkiṟa tiruciṉṉattukku muṉpe paṉṉāṭṭāṉ tampirāṉ Eṉkiṟa tiru
c ciṉṉam paṇimāṟakkaṭavateṉṟu perumāḷ kulottuṅka coḻatevar tiruvāy malarntaruḷiṉapaṭikku śrīmahāśvararakṣai § Ikkalveṭṭiṉpaṭiye tirunāḷkkaḷ toṟum taṇṭiko
ḷḷavum Iṉṉāyanāṟkku Amutupaṭi cāttupaṭikku Uṭalāka nālāvatu mutal villukkoru paṇamāka maṇṭaṅkaḷilum veṇkalam Eṭuttu maṇkalam Uṭaittu kuttiyum Aṭittum taṇṭimuta
lākkavum Itukku Ilaṅkaṇam (ñ)coṉṉāruṇṭākil nammiloruva ṉ Allavākavum Ivaṉ Uṟpatti Ūṉa virapattiramu Eṭuttu Iṉṉāyanāṟku tiruppaṇi
kku mutalākkavum Ippaṭi cammatittu caṉtirātittavaraiyuñ cella kalveṭṭi kuṭuttom pala maṇṭalaṅkaḷil paḷḷināṭṭavarom Ippaṭikku Ivai palaContinuation lost.
Digital edition of SII 28.35 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
